title: Crow's Create Fabric New
description: This mod pack is create Fabric and a couple of add-on. it was purely made for my server but feel free to use it whoever stumbles across it
body:
This mod pack is for Create fabric 1.20.1 it also adds mods like 

Create Nuclear.

Farmers Delight.

Create craft and additions.

Terralith.

The Origins mod.

Create big cannons.

Create Steam 'n' Rails.

Sophisticated backpacks and more this mod pack has everything you'll need for create fabric 1.20.1 you don't have to worry about anything just download and play
![Create Fabric all in one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ffed33016a5f2e313506f1e0b0d6d4f72f9f901.png)
this was purely made for my server but feel free to use it who ever stumbles across it, I will be makeing more Fabric compatible mod packs, Please make sure you always are on the latest version.
